---
title: "Prediction-domain-adaptive-validation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Prediction-domain-adaptive-validation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


## Setup
```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	collapse = TRUE,
	comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(PDAV)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(simsam)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggnewscale)
```

## Simulate predictors and response
```{r}
r <- PDAV:::generate_rast()
samples <- PDAV:::generate_samples(r, 100)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 4
#| echo: false

ggplot() +
	geom_spatraster(data = r) +
	coord_sf(expand = FALSE, datum = st_crs(r)) +
	scale_fill_viridis_c() +
	facet_wrap(~lyr) +
	theme_bw() +
	theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
```



## NNDM

## kNNDM

## DA-CV

## Comparison
